markets.question: CS Cristal vs. Sport Boys Association: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game between CS Cristal and Sport Boys Association, scheduled for March 15 at 12:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if CS Cristal and Sport Boys Association combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on liga1.pe. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: CS Cristal vs. Sport Boys Association: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game between CS Cristal and Sport Boys Association, scheduled for March 15 at 12:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both CS Cristal and Sport Boys Association each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
